creator: svysh@pn.sinp.msu.ru
text:
A note from maintainer.

Module devel/p5-Workflow ver. 1.34 needs a thorough testing and
discussion with authors.
I do not recommend update to ver. 1.34 at this moment.

On 26.08.2012 5:40, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of devel/p5-Workflow,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/171073 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/171073
>
